description: Item type hierarchy â€” defines equipment categories, socket rules, and class restrictions.

ItemType.description: Display name of the item type category. Not read by 1.13c engine

Code.description: Unique 3-4 character item code. Not read by 1.13c engine

Order.description: Sort order priority for inventory display. Not read by 1.13c engine

Equiv1.description: Equivalent item type 1 (parent in type hierarchy). Not read by 1.13c engine

Equiv2.description: Equivalent item type 2 (parent in type hierarchy). Not read by 1.13c engine

Identify.description: Whether items of this type require identification. Not read by 1.13c engine

Repair.description: Item can be repaired. Not read by 1.13c engine

Mods.description: Whether items of this type can receive magical modifiers. Not read by 1.13c engine

Body.description: Equippable on body slot. Not read by 1.13c engine

BodyLoc1.description: Primary equipment slot location. Not read by 1.13c engine

BodyLoc2.description: Secondary equipment slot location. Not read by 1.13c engine

Shoots.description: Ammunition item type code this weapon fires (e.g. bowq, xboq). Not read by 1.13c engine

Quiver.description: Weapon type code this ammo is used with (e.g. bow, xbow). Not read by 1.13c engine

Reload.description: Whether this item type auto-reloads ammunition from inventory. Not read by 1.13c engine

ReEquip.description: Whether this item type auto-re-equips when quantity is replenished. Not read by 1.13c engine

autostack.description: Whether this item type automatically stacks in inventory

magic.description: Whether items of this type can spawn as magic quality

Rare.description: Can spawn as rare quality. Not read by 1.13c engine

normal.description: Whether items of this type can spawn as normal quality

Charm.description: Whether this item type functions as a charm (passive effect in inventory). Not read by 1.13c engine

Gem.description: Whether this item type functions as a gem/rune for socketing. Not read by 1.13c engine

MaxSock1.description: Maximum number of sockets for items at low level (1-25). Not read by 1.13c engine

MaxSock25.description: Maximum number of sockets for items at mid level (25-40). Not read by 1.13c engine

MaxSock40.description: Maximum number of sockets for items at high level (40+). Not read by 1.13c engine

Rarity.description: Spawn rarity ratio (1/N chance). Not read by 1.13c engine

costformula.description: Cost calculation formula type (0 = standard, 1 = armor, 2 = weapon)

Class.description: Character class restriction. Not read by 1.13c engine

VarInvGfx.description: Number of inventory graphic variations. Not read by 1.13c engine

InvGfx1.description: Inventory graphic variation 1. Not read by 1.13c engine

InvGfx2.description: Inventory graphic variation 2. Not read by 1.13c engine

InvGfx3.description: Inventory graphic variation 3. Not read by 1.13c engine

InvGfx4.description: Inventory graphic variation 4. Not read by 1.13c engine

InvGfx5.description: Inventory graphic variation 5. Not read by 1.13c engine

InvGfx6.description: Inventory graphic variation 6. Not read by 1.13c engine

StorePage.description: NPC store tab page. Not read by 1.13c engine
